description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest, windows-2019, macos-13, macos-14) with different compilers (g++, clang++, cl) and build types (Release, Debug). For each job, check out the repository, configure CMake with the specified compiler and build type, build the project, and run tests.
